author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

Surge Rewards - Claimable Now

Hey everyone, we just sent all rewards out to players who played Surge on April 20!

The rewards for qualifying individuals are:
 500 ATLAS  
 Common MUD Crew (Sigmund Nok)  
 Uncommon ONI Crew (Berpek Ula Eko)  
 RARE Ustur Crew (Gagli.doer)  

Note: The wallet used to play Surge on the Epic Games Store is the wallet that can claim the rewards

 | Claim now at https://play.staratlas.com/inventory/
